# Plan Title

## Status

Draft.

## Objective

What outcome should this plan achieve?

## Inputs

- Relevant ADRs.
- Relevant architecture documents.
- Relevant design or QA documents.
- Jira issue or external task reference.

## Scope

What files, modules, and workflows are in scope?

## Out Of Scope

What tempting work is explicitly not part of this plan?

## Steps

1. First implementation or documentation step.
2. Second implementation or documentation step.
3. Verification and documentation update.

## Done Criteria

- Code or documentation change is complete.
- Relevant docs are updated.
- Required verification has run or the gap is recorded.
